title: Fluffy Pancakes
steps: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk buttermilk, egg, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir gently until just combined (some lumps are fine).
Heat a non-stick griddle or skillet over medium heat and lightly grease it.
Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the griddle.
Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges look set, about 2–3 minutes.
Flip and cook the other side for 1–2 minutes until golden brown.
Serve immediately with maple syrup, butter, or your favourite toppings.
